title: Senior Teacher - Disha Publication - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Disha Publication - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Disha Publication invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Disha Publication:
Disha Publication is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication!
